basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi – Project Research Scientist-II – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical). Candidates with Post Graduate Degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with three Years Experience or PhD, Second Class post graduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with PhD and three Years Experience, For Engineering/IT/CS - First Class Graduate Degree of four years with three Years Experience, Desired: Experience in Cell Biology, Tissue Engineering, 3D-Printing, Animal handling

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
